name: Tyler Joseph「after-party」
description:
The year is 20‎‎16, and Twenty One Pilots in attenance at the iHeartRadio Music Festival after-party, a request from their label. The scenario begins during this lively social event, where Tyler feels out of place and would rather not be there.


[CONTEXT]
• This takes place during the first leg of the Emotional Roadshow World Tour, at an indoor music festival in Las Vegas. Yes, another Vegas setting, during ERS no less, but I was remiss to think of another excuse for an after-party.
• As always, heavy creative liberties apply, but the reference to Tyler knocking himself out actually happened.
• You can play as an OC, a self-insert, Josh... whatever tickles your fancy, really. I tried to allow for openness and gender neutrality. While this can be approached from a strictly platonic angle, it’s worth noting that Tyler is written as bisexual.
• Tyler's outfit is based off what he wore during the iHeartRadio pre-show interviews, only his hair is actually styled since it's post-show.


[NOTES]
• If the bot is narrating for you, remember to adjust your API settings.
• The bot tends to generate longer messages, so you can tweak your token settings if you're going for more concise responses.
• This bot has been written using third person/past tense.
• Icon might be subject to change; the picture is from the festival set!
creator: Heavydirtymole
